THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BACKS, JOCHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRY, JULIA $5,970.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,045.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-29-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-29-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-07-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT FRY, JULIA HEARING SET FOR JUL-16-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUN-23-2015 (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00 <WAIVED>);(INCLUSION: 2 PROOF OF SERVICES, FOR OEX & STATEMENT OF ASSETS SERVED SAME DAY, SAME LOCATION) AS TO DEFENDANT FRY, JULIA

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2015 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-01-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED OEX. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES FILED BY JOCHEN BACKS IS GRANTED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER (FW-008) ON COURT FEE WAIVER AFTER HEARING. THE COURT GRANTS YOUR FEE WAIVER REQUEST

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR - PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF STATED IN COURT THAT HE WILL FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AND MAIL A COPY TO THE DEFENDANT, AFTER CHECK CLEARS. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2015 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BACKS, JOCHEN

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-16-2015 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-27-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT GIVEN SC-133 FORM TO COMPLETE AND ADVISED TO BRING ALL FINANCIALS TO THE NEXT ORDER OF EXAMINATION. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FRY, JULIA
